content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Login-gated app with subscription paywall, but review notes are a placeholder ("n/a" in fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt); credentials exist but no steps explain how to reach premium blocking features (App/PaywallView.swift:7).
Pierre: Apple rejects builds under 2.1 when reviewers cannot exercise core functionality, and FocusShield gates blocking, schedules, and reports behind both a login (App/LoginView.swift SecureField) and a $4.99/month paywall. The demo account looks real (reviewer@focusshield.example), but "n/a" notes give App Review no path past the paywall. Replace the notes with concrete steps: how to sign in, whether the demo account has premium unlocked or a sandbox purchase is expected, and how to trigger the app-blocking flow.
